title: ALTER TABLE RENAME fails for triggers that use the table name with a different case
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, value DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0);
CREATE TRIGGER TestTrigger AFTER INSERT ON TestTable FOR EACH ROW UPDATE TestTable SET value = value + 1 WHERE id = NEW.id;
SPARQL INSERT { ?s a <TestTable> . } WHERE { SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s <name> 'Sample' . } };
key_bug_features: ALTER TABLE RENAME with case-sensitive trigger names
